text:
How AI Helps These 9 Companies Hire Better

Explore how MNCs, startups and innovative companies like Unilever, Siemens, P&G, etc., are using AI in recruitment to attract, assess, and acquire talent.

Top 9 Companies Using AI for Recruitment:

1. Amazon - Built tools helping job applicants throughout the hiring process, from identifying suitable positions to providing flexibility through online assessments using Natural Language Processing for resume screening and matching. Results: Enhanced hiring process promoting equity and fairness; Reduced bias; increased recruiter capabilities; Real-time job role recommendations.

2. Unilever - Partnered with skills assessment tools to streamline recruitment. Their AI system analyzes video interviews, examining facial expressions, body language, and word choice. Results: 1 million in annual savings; Over 100,000 hours of human recruitment time saved; Improved candidate diversity; Processed approximately 2 million job applications.

3. Delta Air Lines - Developed AI-powered chatbots answering candidate queries. Results: Ranked sixth-best employer globally (Forbes); Filled 25% of corporate and management positions; Improved candidate experience.

4. Siemens AG - Partnered with Eightfold recruiting platform. Results: Hiring time decreased from 150 days to 60 days for some roles; Digital solutions reduced manual planning efforts by 40%.

5. Domino's - Uses AI to structure recruitment, selection, and hiring. Results: Significantly reduced talent identification costs; Better, more comprehensive predictions than human judgment.

6. Electrolux - Partnered with assessment firms utilizing AI systems. Results: 84% increase in application conversation rate; 51% decrease in incomplete applications; 9% decrease in time to hire; 20% recruitment time saved.

7. Hilton - Developed AI-powered chatbots and implements AI-powered interview platforms. Results: Improved hiring rates by 40%; Reduced vacant position replacement times by 90%.

8. Procter and Gamble (P&G) - Introduced bot-based foundational models assisting cloud engineers. Results: Simplified FAQ handling; Streamlined hiring process.

9. Nomad Health - Utilizes transformative technology connecting travel clinicians to open positions. Results: Successfully addressed healthcare staffing gaps; Reduced administrative burden.
